privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: GDPR, App Store, and Google Play compliant

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. The types of information we collect include:
listItems: Game usage statistics and session data
App performance reports and crash logs
Device information and OS version
User preferences and settings

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to:
listItems: Provide and maintain our games
Improve app performance and user experience
Analyze usage patterns to optimize features
Respond to user feedback and support requests

sections.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
sections.content: All user data is stored locally on your device. We do not transmit or store any personal information on external servers. Your game data remains private and under your control.

sections.title: 4. Scope of Data
sections.content: The app collects only technical (diagnostic) data related to app performance errors. This data does not allow for user identification.

sections.title: 5. Purposes of Processing
sections.content: We use the collected data for:
listItems: Diagnosing technical issues
Improving app performance

sections.title: 6. Legal Basis
sections.content: Article 6(1)(f) GDPR – legitimate interest.

sections.title: 7. Data Recipients
sections.content: Technical providers (e.g., Google Crashlytics) may process diagnostic data solely for functionality.

sections.title: 8. Data Transfer
sections.content: Possible transfers outside the EEA follow Standard Contractual Clauses.

sections.title: 9. User Rights
sections.content: You have the right to:
listItems: Access, rectification, restriction, deletion
Contact us at: contact@showdown.app

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By downloading, installing, or using the ShowDown App, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the app.

sections.title: 2. Purpose
sections.content: ShowDown is a social entertainment application providing TV-style quiz games. All content is intended for entertainment purposes only.

sections.title: 3. Services
sections.content: The app provides access to various game show formats and content packs. Some content may require in-app purchases.

sections.title: 4. Use Limitations
sections.content: You may use this app for personal, non-commercial purposes only. You may not:
listItems: Reverse engineer or decompile the app
Distribute or sell copies of the app
Use the app for any illegal purposes
Violate any applicable laws or regulations

sections.title: 5. Payments
sections.content: In‑app purchases are managed via Apple App Store or Google Play under their respective policies.

sections.title: 6. Content Accuracy
sections.content: While we strive for accuracy in our quiz questions and data, we do not guarantee that all information provided in the games is correct or up-to-date. Content is for fun and should not be used as a primary source of information.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All game mechanics, designs, and content within ShowDown are the property of the publisher and protected by intellectual property laws.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The app and its creators are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this application, including but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

sections.title: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the app after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

theme_cyberpunk.title: Cyberpunk
theme_cyberpunk.desc: A high-contrast neon theme with electric blue accents and late-night arcade energy.

theme_ocean.title: Ocean Breeze
theme_ocean.desc: A cool, deep-sea palette with bright aqua highlights and a calm, refreshing feel.

theme_forest.title: Enchanted Forest
theme_forest.desc: Rich woodland greens with warm bark tones for a grounded, natural look.

ladder_ancient-history.title: Ancient History
ladder_ancient-history.desc: Climb through 5,000 years of empires, pharaohs, and legendary battles — 300 brand-new questions.

drop_world-geography.title: World Geography
drop_world-geography.desc: Rivers, peaks, cities, and oceans from across the globe — 180 brand-new questions to bank on.

drop_our-changing-planet.title: Our Changing Planet
drop_our-changing-planet.desc: Nature's extremes, oceans, and our impact on Earth — 180 fresh statistics to bank on.

wheel_world-cuisine.title: World Cuisine
wheel_world-cuisine.desc: Spin through dishes, desserts, and flavors from around the globe — 60 mouth-watering puzzles.

wheel_world-landmarks.title: World Landmarks
wheel_world-landmarks.desc: Travel the globe from the Eiffel Tower to the Great Wall — 60 iconic new puzzles.

ladder_lost-civilizations.title: Lost Civilizations
ladder_lost-civilizations.desc: Uncover the secrets of the Maya, Sumerians, and more — 300 challenging new questions.

feature.ladder_ancient-history_2: A difficulty climb from classroom classics to specialist deep cuts

feature.drop_world-geography_2: Real figures with tight distractors to test your gut

feature.drop_our-changing-planet_2: Real figures with tight distractors to test your gut
feature.wheel_world-cuisine_1: 60 fresh food puzzles from world kitchens
feature.wheel_world-cuisine_2: Dishes, spices, cheeses, and sweets in every round
feature.wheel_world-landmarks_1: 60 fresh puzzles featuring the world's most famous sites
feature.wheel_world-landmarks_2: Spans ancient wonders, modern marvels, and natural beauties
feature.ladder_lost-civilizations_1: 300 deep-cut questions on archaeology and ancient mysteries
feature.ladder_lost-civilizations_2: Spans the Americas, Mesopotamia, Asia, and Africa

the-ladder.name: The Climb
the-ladder.desc: Climb the 15-question trivia ladder. One wrong answer ends your run — unless you spend a lifeline.

setup.categoryDesc: Choose the trivia topic for your climb

active.question: Question %{number} of 15
active.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? Your run will be lost.

the-ladder.rules:
1. Answer 15 trivia questions of increasing difficulty.
2. Each correct answer climbs you one rung up the ladder.
3. A wrong answer ends your run.
4. Stuck? Spend one of your three lifelines: 50:50, Ask the Audience, or Skip.
5. Reach the top to win the grand prize!

the-grid.name: The Grid
the-grid.desc: Pick a category, wager your points, and answer the clue. The bigger the risk, the bigger the reward.

setup.categoryDesc: Choose the question board to play

active.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? All progress will be lost.

the-grid.rules:
1. Teams take turns choosing a category and point value from the grid.
2. Read the clue aloud and wager points on your answer.
3. A correct answer wins the points; a wrong answer loses them.
4. Clear the board — the team with the most points wins!

the-wheel.name: Letter Wheel
the-wheel.desc: Spin for a multiplier, guess letters, and solve the hidden word puzzle.

active.fillBlanks: Tap letters to fill the blanks
active.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? All progress will be lost.

the-wheel.rules:
1. Spin the wheel to set the value of your next correct letter.
2. Guess a consonant to earn the spin value for each occurrence.
3. Buy a vowel for a fixed cost.
4. Solve the puzzle to win the round — but land on Bankrupt and you lose your turn's cash!
5. The team with the most points wins.

the-drop.name: The Drop
the-drop.desc: You hold a million in cash. Each round, spread your bank across the answers you trust — wrong answers drop away, right ones survive. Protect your fortune for 9 rounds.
the-drop.rules:
1. You start with 1,000,000, in 25,000 bundles.
2. Each round, place your whole bank across up to 3 of the 4 answers — never all four.
3. Money on the correct answer survives to the next round; the rest drops.
4. Money never grows, so protect as much as you can.
5. Survive 9 rounds without hitting zero. Your final bank is your score.

instruction.one: Spread your whole bank across up to %{max} option (never all 4).
instruction.other: Spread your whole bank across up to %{max} options (never all 4).

active.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? All progress will be lost.

over.title: The Drop
over.survived: You made it to the end!

requirement.ladder-scorer: Score %{n} in a single Climb run
requirement.drop-scorer: Score %{n} in a single Drop run
requirement.wheel-scorer: Score %{n} in a single Letter Wheel run

requirementOneoff.well-rounded: Win each of the three games at least once
requirementOneoff.triple-threat: Play all three games in one day
requirementOneoff.spotless: Win a Climb run using no lifelines
requirementOneoff.survivor: Survive all 9 rounds of The Drop
requirementOneoff.iron-bank: Finish The Drop keeping at least half the starting bank
requirementOneoff.vowel-free: Solve a Letter Wheel puzzle without buying a vowel
requirementOneoff.clean-sweep: Solve all 3 Letter Wheel puzzles in one run
requirementOneoff.quick-wit: Answer under 5s at a high rung on The Climb
requirementOneoff.comeback: Solve a Letter Wheel puzzle after recovering from a Bankrupt
